meta.topic: 中国が隠した日本依存の闇
meta.theme_title: 中国が隠した{red:日本依存}の闇
meta.style: Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, emoji-faced mob characters

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_01.png
scenes.text: 先生、{red:中国が日本に制裁}を仕掛けたってニュースを見たんですけど、日本は大丈夫なんですか？
scenes.description: 少年がリビングでTVニュースを見て驚く冒頭シーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A living room. A chibi boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie, same height as teacher) sitting on a couch watching TV news. The TV shows a red BREAKING NEWS banner with Chinese and Japanese flags. The boy looks shocked with wide eyes. 2 emoji-faced mob characters (family members) also watching TV: one with 😰 worried face, one with 😮 surprised face. Warm cozy living room lighting.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_02.png
scenes.text: 2026年1月、中国は{red:軍民両用品の対日輸出禁止}を発表したわ。
scenes.description: エイミー先生が中国の制裁発表を解説
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A dramatic news-style scene. Amy-sensei (silver/white long hair, blue eyes, red/maroon blazer) standing on the left, explaining with a serious expression. On the right, a large Chinese flag backdrop with a mob character in a dark formal suit with a 🇨🇳 Chinese flag circle as face, holding up a document with a red X mark. 2 more emoji-faced mob reporters with 😮 faces in the foreground taking notes. Dark dramatic lighting with red undertones.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_03.png
scenes.text: でもね、{red:面白いのはその裏}で起きていることなの。
scenes.description: エイミー先生が意味深に微笑む転換シーン
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Close-up style composition. Amy-sensei (silver/white long hair, blue eyes, red/maroon blazer) with a knowing, confident smirk, holding up one finger as if revealing a secret. Behind her, a split background: left side dark (China flag motif), right side bright (Japan flag motif). 2 emoji-faced mob characters behind her with 🤔 thinking faces, looking curious. Mysterious atmosphere.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_04_test.png
scenes.text: 日本は{red:フォトレジスト}という半導体に必須の素材で、{red:高性能品の95パーセント}を握ってるの。
scenes.description: エイミー先生が半導体工場で日本のフォトレジスト優位性を解説

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/panels/photoresist_share_v2.jpg
scenes.text: 日本は{red:フォトレジスト}という半導体に必須の素材で、{red:高性能品の95パーセント}を握ってるの。
scenes.description: フォトレジスト市場シェア95%のデータパネル

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/panels/shinetsu_export_drop_v2.jpg
scenes.text: {red:信越化学}の対中輸出は一気に{red:42パーセント減}ったわ。
scenes.description: 信越化学の対中輸出42%減のデータパネル

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_07.png
scenes.text: えっ、{red:日本側から先に引いた}ってことですか？
scenes.description: 少年が驚いて聞き返す
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: The boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie, same height as teacher) in the foreground with a shocked/surprised expression, eyes wide, mouth open. Amy-sensei (silver hair, red outfit) behind him with a confident knowing smile. Background: a simplified factory silhouette fading away, symbolizing Japan's withdrawal. 2 emoji-faced mob factory workers with 😰 worried faces watching in the background.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/panels/localization_vs_v2.jpg
scenes.text: 中国は2026年までにフォトレジストの{red:国産化率40パーセント}を目指してるけど、今はまだ{red:10パーセント}程度。
scenes.description: 中国の国産化率 目標40% vs 現実10% のデータパネル

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_09_test.png
scenes.text: つまり日本が抜けたら、{red:中国の半導体工場は動かせなくなる}の。
scenes.description: 日中の対立構図 — エイミー先生＋少年 vs 中国国旗顔モブ

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_10.png
scenes.text: じゃあ中国の{red:レアアース制裁}はどうなんですか？あっちも止められたら困りますよね？
scenes.description: 少年がレアアースについて質問
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: The boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) looking worried and questioning, hands up in a questioning gesture. Behind him, a visual of rare earth minerals (colorful glowing rocks/crystals) with a Chinese flag on one side. 3 emoji-faced mob miners with 😤 angry faces guarding the minerals. Dark moody background.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_11.png
scenes.text: 実は中国のレアアース規制、発表はしたけど{red:実施を1年間棚上げ}したの。
scenes.description: エイミー先生が棚上げの裏事情を暴露
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: Amy-sensei (silver hair, blue eyes, red outfit) with a sly smile, revealing a secret. On the right, a mob character with 🇨🇳 Chinese flag face in a suit, sweating nervously (sweat drops), holding a document labeled with a clock/hourglass symbol (representing the 1-year delay). The document has a red PAUSE stamp feel. 2 emoji-faced mob advisors with 😰 worried faces whispering behind the flag-face character. Tense atmosphere.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/panels/rareearth_vs_photoresist_v2.jpg
scenes.text: 本気で止めたら、{red:日本のフォトレジストも止まる}。お互いに{red:首を絞め合う構造}なのよ。
scenes.description: レアアース vs フォトレジストの相互依存データパネル

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_13.png
scenes.text: {red:チキンレース}みたいな状態ってことですか...。
scenes.description: 少年がチキンレースに例える
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A dramatic chicken race visualization. The boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) in the center looking nervous with sweat drops. On the left, a mob character with 🇯🇵 Japanese flag face driving a car toward the center. On the right, a mob character with 🇨🇳 Chinese flag face driving a car toward the center. The two cars are heading toward each other on a collision course. Dramatic speed lines and tension. Dark dramatic background.

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_14_test.png
scenes.text: しかも日本は{red:南鳥島沖}でレアアースの{red:海底採掘}を始めたわ。
scenes.description: 南鳥島沖の海底採掘シーン

scenes.asset: samples/中国が隠した日本依存の闇/assets/scenes/scene_15.png
scenes.text: 成功すれば{red:中国カードの威力は大幅に落ちる}。静かに、でも着実に手を打ってるの。
scenes.description: エイミー先生がまとめ — 日本の静かな勝利
scenes.prompt:
Fermi Lab chibi anime style, 2-3 head proportions, clean lines, soft shading, horizontal 16:9 landscape.

Scene: A triumphant closing scene. Amy-sensei (silver hair, blue eyes, red outfit) standing tall and confident in the center with a proud smile. The boy (teal hair, round glasses, white dinosaur hoodie) next to her looking inspired and relieved. Behind them, a bright sunrise over the ocean (Minami-Torishima), with a Japanese flag waving. On the left side, a small defeated mob character with 🇨🇳 Chinese flag face looking down. 3 emoji-faced mob citizens with 😊 happy faces and 💪 strong poses on the right. Hopeful, bright atmosphere.
